positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric mandala composition featuring interlocking forest creatures and celestial elements. The main subject is a stylized stag's head merged with constellations and flora, flanked by graceful deer and subtle flying owls. Use a minimalist modern art style with deep indigo, emerald green, and metallic gold accents. The composition must be highly clean and scalable, focusing on strong, sharp silhouettes against a negative space background. Central placement, vector illustration quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel, clean lines, high contrast, engraved aesthetic, symmetrical design.
